scripts.pack: npm run build && web-ext build --source-dir='.' --artifacts-dir='build' --ignore-files '.*' '*.txt' Makefile export_mac_list.js test_list '*.sublime*' test.html test_tinymce.html test_media 'test_media/*' src node_modules package.json package-lock.json build.js tests 'tests/**' playwright.config.js issue.md '.github' '.github/**'
